description_long: This is a round, deep bowl with a smooth, slightly flared rim and a wide open top. The exterior is primarily a warm yellow color, accented by a red band around the rim and a green band at the base. On two opposite sides of the bowl, there is a prominent circular emblem featuring a green cannabis leaf centered within a red and black ring. The interior is plain yellow, matching the exterior base color, and the bowl appears to be made of a lightweight, possibly plastic or ceramic material. The surface is matte with a slight sheen, and the bowl is empty inside. The overall design suggests a modern, urban aesthetic with a bold decorative motif.
description: A yellow bowl with red and green accents, featuring a cannabis leaf emblem on two sides. The bowl is deep, round, and has a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: The bowl is shown from an angle where the plain yellow exterior and red rim are visible, with only a partial view of the emblem on the far side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the bowl, displaying the cannabis leaf emblem prominently on the yellow surface, with the red rim and green base accent visible.
description_view_2: The bowl is seen from the opposite side of view 0, again showing mostly the plain yellow exterior and a partial emblem on the far side.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing the second cannabis leaf emblem on the opposite side, with the same color accents and smooth finish.
attribute_context_of_use: serving snacks or holding small items, possibly in a casual or themed setting
attribute_decorative_patterns: circular cannabis leaf emblem with red and black rings on two opposite sides
